docTitle: Bibiliya ku ikarita · Bibiliya muri rumwe
metaDesc: Kurikira urutonde rw'ibihe by'Isezerano rya Kera, ubugingo bwa Yesu, n'ingendo za Pawulo ku ikarita nyayo — Bibiliya yabereye mu hantu nyakuri.

s.title: Bibiliya ku ikarita
s.verse: “Burya ntitwakurikije imigani yahimbwe n'ubwenge, ubwo twabamenyeshaga imbaraga z'Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo no kuzaza kwe, ahubwo twiboneye n'amaso yacu icyubahiro cye gikomeye,” (2 Petero 1:16)
s.purpose: Bibiliya si umugani. Ni inyandiko y'abantu bagendeye mu hantu, ku matariki, n'amazina nyabyo. Kurikira izo nzira ku ikarita, mu rutonde rw'ibihe — kanda ku kadomo, cyangwa ukande ▶ kugira ngo ubinyuremo intambwe ku yindi.
s.ot_kick: ① Isezerano rya Kera — mu rugendo rw'ibihe
s.ot_h: Kuva ku iremwa kugeza ku kugaruka i Yerusalemu
s.ot_lead: Si urugendo rumwe ahubwo ni umuyoboro w'amateka y'agakiza uhereye ku iremwa: iremwa no kugwa → umwuzure na Babeli → guhamagara (Aburahamu) → igihugu cy'isezerano → Kuva muri Egiputa → ubutayu → kwigarurira igihugu → ubwami → kugabanuka → ubunyage → kugaruka.
s.je_kick: ② Isezerano Rishya — ubugingo bwa Yesu
s.je_h: Kuva i Betelehemu kugeza i Yerusalemu
s.je_lead: Kurikira ubugingo bwa Yesu nk'uko Amavanjiri abuvuga, mu rutonde — uhereye ku kuvuka kwe i Betelehemu, unyuze ku kubatizwa kwe n'umurimo wo i Galilaya, wambuka Samariya, ugeze ku musaraba, ku kuzuka no ku kuzamuka i Yerusalemu.
s.pa_kick: ③ Isezerano Rishya — ingendo za Pawulo
s.pa_h: Kuva i Antiyokiya kugeza ku mpera y'isi — i Roma
s.pa_lead: Uhereye kuri Pentekote i Yerusalemu, uko ubutumwa bwiza bwakwiriye butarengeje Yudaya gusa — bunyura muri Aziya Ntoya n'i Burayi bugera mu mutima w'ingoma. Toranya rumwe mu ngendo eshanu (iya 1·iya 2·iya 3 + urugendo rwo i Roma + nyuma yo gufungurwa) maze ukurikire ibyabaye mu Byakozwe hamwe n'amabaruwa yanditswe mu nzira.
s.foot: Inkomoko · Ahantu hakurikiza umwandiko wa Bibiliya na geografiya isanzwe ya Bibiliya (hamwe n'amazina ya none aho bifasha). Inkombe z'inyanja, imigezi n'ibiyaga byashushanyijwe bishingiye ku makuru ya geografiya afunguye (Natural Earth), yoroheje.

eden.name: Edeni (Iremwa · Kugwa)
eden.note: Mu isi yaremwe iri “nziza cyane,” icyaha cyinjira gicika isano hagati y'Imana n'umuntu.
events: Isezerano rya mbere ry'ubutumwa bwiza — “urubyaro rw'umugore ruzakomeretsa umutwe w'inzoka”

noah.name: Ararati (Umwuzure)
noah.today: Umusozi Ararati, mu burasirazuba bwa Turukiya uyu munsi
noah.note: Imana ica urubanza isi yuzuyemo icyaha, nyamara igakiza ubugingo binyuze ku muryango umwe.

babel.name: Umunara wa Babeli
babel.note: Imbere y'ubwibone bushaka kugera mu ijuru, Imana ivanga ururimi rwabo igatataniriza abantu mu isi.
events: Abantu batatanira mu isi (Shinari — waje kuba Babuloni)

ur.name: Uri
ur.note: Inkuru y'agakiza ya Bibiliya itangirira ku guhamagara umuntu umwe.
events: Imana ihamagara Aburamu imukura i Uri rw'Abakaludaya
“Nzaguhindura ubwoko bukomeye… imiryango yose izaherwa umugisha muri wowe”
Ku bwo kwizera ava mu gihugu cye

haran.name: Harani
haran.note: Mu nzira, asubiza ku ihamagara yerekeza ku gihugu cy'isezerano.
events: Umuryango wa Tera utura i Harani
Aburamu yerekeza i Kanani afite imyaka 75

shechem.name: Shekemu · Kanani
shechem.note: Mu gihugu cy'isezerano hashingwa umuryango maze isezerano rikomeza ku bisekuruza.
events: Kwinjira i Kanani, igicaniro cya mbere — “iki gihugu nzagiha urubyaro rwawe”
Abahungu cumi na babiri ba Yakobo — umuzi w'imiryango cumi n'ibiri

egypt.name: Egiputa (Gosheni)
egypt.today: Delta ya Nili, Egiputa uyu munsi
egypt.note: Umuryango uba ubwoko bukomeye — hanyuma ubwoko bw'imbohe.
events: Yozefu, wagurishijwe, aba umutware muri Egiputa
Umuryango wose wa Yakobo umanuka uhunga inzara
Ubwoko bwa Isirayeli bwiyongera bugirwa imbohe

sinai.name: Umusozi Sinayi
sinai.today: Igice cy'igihugu cya Sinayi uyu munsi
sinai.note: Agakiza gakomeye cyane mu Isezerano rya Kera — imbohe ziba ubwoko bw'Imana.
events: Ibyago cumi n'umwana w'intama wa Pasika
Amategeko Icumi, Amategeko, ihema ry'ibonaniro n'ibitambo

kadesh.name: Kadeshi (ubutayu)
kadesh.note: Kutizera gutuma igisekuru gitakaza igihugu — nyamara Imana ikomeza kuba kumwe na bo.
events: Abatasi cumi na babiri — ariko ubwoko bwanga kwizera
Imyaka 38 mu butayu — umugati wo mu ijuru, igicu n'umuriro
Ku ikibaya cya Mowabu, ijambo rya nyuma rya Mose (Gutegeka kwa Kabiri)

jericho.name: Yeriko
events: Uruzi rwa Yorodani rutandukana ubwoko buranyura

shiloh.name: Shilo (Abacamanza)
shiloh.note: Nta mwami, umuntu wese akora uko ashaka — umwami nyakuri arakenewe.
events: Rusi — gukiranuka mu minsi y'umwijima, mu rubyaro rwa Dawidi

jerusalem.name: Yerusalemu · Ubwami bumwe
jerusalem.note: Igihe cy'ubusugire bwa Isirayeli — n'isezerano ry'umwami w'iteka.
events: Sawuli umwami wa mbere, hanyuma Dawidi na Goliyati
Isezerano rya Dawidi — “intebe yawe izahoraho iteka” (2 Samweli 7)

samaria.name: Samariya · Ubwami bwagabanyijwe
samaria.note: Ubwami buragabanuka kandi bukajya bibora mu gihe abahanuzi bataka.
events: Nyuma ya Salomo, ubwami bugabanyamo Yuda na Isirayeli
Eliya, Yesaya, Yeremiya bataka bati ‘nimugaruke’ — kandi bahanura Mesiya

nineveh.name: Nineve (Ashuri)
nineveh.note: Bwirengagije imiburo yose, ubwami bw'amajyaruguru bugwa mbere.
events: Ubwami bw'amajyaruguru bugwa imbere ya Ashuri (722 MIC)

babylon.name: Babuloni
babylon.note: Ijoro ririndushije cyane — nyamara isezerano ryo kuvugururwa rikomeza kubaho.
events: Yuda ijyanwa mu bunyage i Babuloni
Daniyeli na Ezekiyeli — ukwizera n'amayerekwa mu bunyage

susa.name: Shushani (Ubuperesi)
susa.note: Ndetse no mu mutima w'ingoma y'abapagani, Imana irinda ubwoko bwayo.
events: Nehemiya asengera imbere y'umwami maze yoherezwa

return.name: Kugaruka i Yerusalemu
return.note: Baragaruka basubira kubaka — ariko nta mwami uje. Bategereza Mesiya.
events: Imihango itatu yo kugaruka ku itegeko rya Kuro (Zerubabeli 538 · Ezira 458 · Nehemiya 444)
Urusengero rwongeye kubakwa n'inkike za Yerusalemu zisanwa
Malaki — Isezerano rya Kera rirasozwa: “nzatuma integuza yanjye”

bethlehem.name: Betelehemu
bethlehem.note: Mesiya wasezeranijwe aza mu mudugudu wa Dawidi — Jambo yabaye umuntu.
events: Yavukiye i Betelehemu, mu mudugudu wa Dawidi

nazareth.name: Nazareti
nazareth.note: Imana ikurira nk'umuntu mu mudugudu usanzwe.
events: Afite imyaka cumi n'ibiri, abaza akanasubiza mu rusengero
Nyuma yangirwa mu isinagogi yo mu mudugudu we

jordan.name: Uruzi rwa Yorodani
jordan.note: Umurimo we rusange uratangira — ijuru rimuhamya nk'Umwana.
events: Umwuka amanuka nk'inuma — “Uyu ni Umwana wanjye nkunda”
Atsinda ibishuko bitatu bya Satani mu butayu

cana.name: Kana
cana.note: Mu gitangaza cye cya mbere ahishura ikuzo rye.
events: Amazi ahindurwa divayi — igitangaza cye cya mbere

sychar.name: Sukari (Samariya)
sychar.note: Inzira y'umurimo wa mbere — inyura i Yerusalemu igera no muri Samariya isuzuguritse.

capernaum.name: Kaperinawumu
capernaum.today: ku nkombe y'ikiyaga cya Galilaya uyu munsi
capernaum.note: Ihuriro ry'umurimo wo i Galilaya — guhamagara, kwigisha no kurwanywa byose bihurira hano.
events: Inyigisho yo ku musozi — “hahirwa abakene mu mutima”

galilee.name: Inyanja ya Galilaya
galilee.note: Afite ubushobozi ku biremwa yerekana uwo ari we.
events: Agaburira abantu 5.000 ku migati itanu n'amafi abiri

caesarea_p.name: Kayisariya Filipi
caesarea_p.note: Abigishwa basobanukirwa ko ari Kristo, maze inzira y'umusaraba ikingurwa.
events: Kwemera kwa Petero — “Uri Kristo, Umwana w'Imana nzima”

jericho.name: Yeriko
jericho.note: Mu nzira azamukana i Yerusalemu, ashaka abazimiye.
events: “Umwana w'umuntu yazanywe no gushaka no gukiza abazimiye”

bethany.name: Betaniya
bethany.note: Yerekana ubushobozi ku rupfu mu mugoroba w'icyumweru cye cya nyuma.
events: Azura Lazaro mu mva — “Ni jye kuzuka n'ubugingo”
Iki gitangaza cyongera umugambi wo kumwica

jerusalem.name: Yerusalemu
jerusalem.note: Indunduro Bibiliya yose yerekezaga — umusaraba, ukuzuka, ukuzamuka.
events: Kwinjira mu ikuzo; ahirika imeza z'urusengero nanone
Ku Ifunguro rya Nyuma akarabira abigishwa ibirenge
Azuka ku munsi wa gatatu, hanyuma arazamuka

antioch.name: Antiyokiya
antioch.note: Itorero ryohereza aho ubutumwa ku banyamahanga butangirira kandi bugarukira.
events: Mu isengesho Umwuka atoranya Barinaba na Sawuli
Aho ingendo ya 1, iya 2 n'iya 3 zitangirira

seleucia.name: Selukiya
seleucia.note: Icyambu cya Antiyokiya — berekeza i Kupuro mu nyanja.

salamis.name: Salami (Kupuro)
salamis.note: Igihagararo cya mbere i Kupuro — kwigisha mu masinagogi.

paphos.name: Pafo
paphos.note: Ubushobozi bwerekanwa ku barwanya ubutumwa bwiza.

perga.name: Peruge
perga.note: Icyambu cya Pamfiliya — hano Yohana Mariko agaruka inyuma.

pantioch.name: Antiyokiya ya Pisidiya
events: Ijambo rirerire ry'amateka y'agakiza mu isinagogi

iconium.name: Ikoniyumu
iconium.note: Benshi baremera, ariko itotezwa ribasunika imbere.

lystra.name: Lusitira
events: Akiza umuntu wari ikimuga kuva avuka
Atewe amabuye atabwa hanze nk'upfuye, ararahuka

derbe.name: Derube
derbe.note: Abigishwa benshi barakorwa; basubira mu nzira gukomeza amatorero.

troas.name: Tirowa
troas.note: Ahantu h'impinduka aho ubutumwa bwiza bubanza kwerekeza i Burayi.

philippi.name: Filipi
philippi.note: Itorero rya mbere ry'i Burayi — ubutumwa bwiza butsinda ndetse no muri gereza.
events: Indirimbo z'ijoro, umutingito, umuryango w'umurinzi wa gereza urakizwa

thess.name: Tesalonike
events: Aganira mu isinagogi mu masabato atatu

corinth.name: Korinto
corinth.note: Amara umwaka n'igice ashinga itorero mu mugi w'ubwiyandarike.
events: Akorana amahema na Akwila na Pirisila

ephesus.name: Efeso
ephesus.note: Umutima w'urugendo rwa gatatu — ijambo rikwira muri Aziya.
events: Kwigisha buri munsi mu myaka ibiri mu ishuri rya Tirano

miletus.name: Mileto
miletus.note: Gusezera kw'amarira ku basaza b'i Efeso.
events: “Mwiyitondere kandi murinde itorero yaguze amaraso ye”
Abasaza bararira, bazi ko batazongera kumubona

caesarea.name: Kayisariya
caesarea.today: ku nkombe ya Isirayeli uyu munsi
caesarea.note: Mu myaka ibiri arengera ubutumwa bwiza imbere y'aba guverineri n'umwami.
events: Imanza imbere ya guverineri Felike na Fesito

jerusalem.name: Yerusalemu
jerusalem.note: Afatirwa mu rusengero, inzira ye nk'imbohe iratangira.
events: Nk'umuturage w'Umuroma, yoherezwa arinzwe i Kayisariya

myra.name: Mira
myra.note: Bimukira mu bwato bw'i Alegizandiriya bwerekeza i Roma.

fairhaven.name: Ibyambu Byiza (Kireta)
fairhaven.note: Umuburo wa Pawulo wo guhagarika urugendo ntiwumvirwa.

crete.name: Kireta
crete.note: Nyuma yo gufungurwa, izinga aho asiga Tito gutunganya amatorero.
events: Asiga Tito gushyiraho abasaza muri buri mugi

malta.name: Malita
malta.note: Binyuze mu muyaga no kumeneka kw'ubwato, isezerano ry'Imana rirakomera.
events: Umuyaga ukomeye umeneza ubwato, nyamara bose 276 barakira

puteoli.name: Puteyoli
puteoli.note: Bagera mu Butaliyani maze abizera bagenzi babo babasanganira.

rome.name: Roma
rome.book: Ibyakozwe 28 · Amabaruwa yo muri gereza · 2 Timoteyo
rome.note: Ubutumwa bwiza bugera mu mutima w'ingoma amaherezo — si iherezo ahubwo ni intangiriro.
events: Imyaka ibiri afungiwe mu rugo, atangaza ubwami ashize amanga
Uhereye hano yandika Amabaruwa yo muri gereza (Abefeso·Abafilipi·Abakolosayi·Filemoni)
Nyuma yongera gufungwa, yandika 2 Timoteyo akicwa — “narwanye intambara nziza, narangije iruhando”

journeys.rome: Urugendo rwa kane · rwo i Roma
journeys.j5: Urugendo rwa gatanu · nyuma yo gufungurwa
